name: FriendFinder Networks Inc.
description: FriendFinder Networks Inc. is an internet and technology company providing online social networking, adult entertainment, and dating services. Founded in 1996, the company operates a portfolio of websites, including FriendFinder, AdultFriendFinder, Cams.com, and Penthouse.com, catering to a diverse global user base seeking social connections, dating, and adult content.
